scripts.deploy-gnosis: yarn generate-manifests && graph deploy pearl-gnosis-transactions subgraph.gnosis.yaml
scripts.deploy-matic: yarn generate-manifests && graph deploy pearl-polygon-transactions subgraph.matic.yaml
scripts.deploy-optimism: yarn generate-manifests && graph deploy pearl-optimism-transactions subgraph.optimism.yaml
scripts.deploy-base: yarn generate-manifests && graph deploy pearl-base-transactions subgraph.base.yaml
scripts.test: ln -s subgraph.gnosis.yaml subgraph.yaml && graph test; rm -f subgraph.yaml

resolutions.//: Selective version resolutions. See subgraphs/staking/package.json for the full explainer; resolutions converge across all subgraph package.json files in this repo.
